meaning: vt.使富足,使肥沃,装饰,加料于,浓缩
examples: Literature can enrich your spiritual life.
While improving material well-being, we should also enrich our spiritual life.
He used his position to enrich himself.
Economics studies how man interacts with the environment transforming scarce resources into products that enrich life.
Invest in a Coverdell if your main objective in life is to enrich your accountant.
